# ExtensionConfigTag

**Type**

A unique identifier for a specific media service configuration.

## Declaration

```swift
string ExtensionConfigTag
```

## Discussion

Change this value whenever anything in your service’s [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/ExtensionConfig] changes. Don’t include any personally identifiable information in this value and ensure the value matches the `/["][ -~]{1000}["]/` pattern.

## Device Configuration

- **Configure Your Service Endpoints**: Provide configuration details for your media server’s endpoints to a HomePod speaker or an Apple TV.
- **ExtensionConfig**: Instructions for accessing your media service’s endpoints.
- **PlayMediaControlActivity**: Options for reporting playback progress.
